q3: The ingredient sections took a few passes — the model kept defaulting to leading with the science and the dosing numbers when I needed it to lead with the feeling first and let the specifics follow as proof. Once I named that directly it clicked, but I had to name it. The CTA gap was similar — the copy would make a solid case and then just... stop, without threading into the button naturally. Not a huge lift, but it was the kind of thing I had to catch and flag rather than it showing up right the first time.
